taskDescription: Arrange the key surface landmarks of the abdomen from superior to inferior (AN55.1-2).
paragraphs: Xiphisternum -- marks the central tendon of the diaphragm and the upper limit of the liver (approximately T9)
Transpyloric plane (L1) -- halfway between jugular notch and pubic symphysis; level of pylorus, SMA origin, kidney hila, and pancreatic neck
Subcostal plane (L3) -- through the lowest point of the costal margin (10th costal cartilage); separates epigastrium from umbilical region
Umbilicus -- at the level of L3-L4 intervertebral disc; site of the transumbilical plane dividing four quadrants
Transtubercular plane (L5) -- through the iliac tubercles; separates the umbilical region from the hypogastric region
McBurney's point -- junction of lateral 1/3 and medial 2/3 of the line from right ASIS to umbilicus; surface projection of the appendix base
